title: polianthes guttata
intro: Polianthes guttata, also known as the Mexican evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Polianthes. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polianthes guttata include its potential to improve symptoms of menopause, reduce anxiety and stress, and support skin health. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in capsule or tincture form.
